tenders.buyer_name: COPERNICUS PODMIOT LECZNICZY SPÓŁKA Z OGRANICZONĄ ODPOWIEDZIALNOŚCIĄ
tenders.english_summary: This is a design-and-build tender for construction and installation works at St. Wojciech Hospital in Gdańsk, Poland, focused on adapting building K to improve cardiology care accessibility and quality. The project includes delivery of an angiography system, preparation of rooms for magnetic resonance equipment installation, and renovation of hospital premises on level 0 of buildings K and A.
tenders.what_they_want: An angiography system (angiograf) with 36-month warranty; design and construction works including renovation and modernization of hospital rooms and infrastructure; preparation of rooms for magnetic resonance (MRI) equipment installation. The angiography equipment must be factory-new, complete, high standard in quality and functionality, free from material and construction defects, and comply with the Medical Devices Act of April 7, 2022.
tenders.eligibility_requirements: Contractors must provide insurance coverage for all risks and liabilities related to contract execution before site handover; must employ personnel performing construction work under supervision of construction manager or branch work managers as per Labour Code Article 22 § 1; no reservation limiting bidding to specific contractor types under Article 94 of Public Procurement Law; equivalent solutions are permitted for specified trademarks, parameters, and technical specifications.
tenders.evaluation_criteria: Warranty period for construction and installation works (minimum 36 months, maximum 60 months from final acceptance) is one of the evaluation criteria. Additional evaluation criteria are not fully specified in the provided excerpt.

tenders.buyer_name: Wielospecjalistyczny Szpital - Samodzielny Publiczny Zespół Opieki Zdrowotnej w Zgorzelcu
tenders.english_summary: This tender is for the expansion of a Long-Term Care Facility (Zakład Opiekuńczo Leczniczy) in Zgorzelec, Poland, to create infrastructure for chronically ill patients. The project is a design-and-build contract including equipment supply for the facility, funded under Poland's National Recovery and Resilience Plan, Component D focusing on healthcare system efficiency, accessibility and quality.
tenders.what_they_want: Design and construction of expanded long-term care facility infrastructure including equipment supply (detailed in Appendix 7.1), demolition works, general construction works, electrical and telecommunications installations, and sanitary networks and installations. Also includes roof repair of existing building.
tenders.eligibility_requirements: Contractor must employ workers directly on employment contracts (in accordance with Polish Labor Code) for demolition works, general construction works, electrical and telecommunications installations, and sanitary networks/installations, with minimum wage requirements. Same requirement applies to subcontractors.

tenders.buyer_name: Wielospecjalistyczny Szpital - Samodzielny Publiczny Zespół Opieki Zdrowotnej w Zgorzelcu
tenders.english_summary: This is a tender for hospital construction work at a Multi-Specialty Hospital in Zgorzelec, Poland. The project involves construction work on an active hospital facility, including expansion of departments such as Urology and Clinical Oncology, and is co-financed by the National Recovery and Resilience Plan (KPO). The work must be completed by a fixed calendar date to meet strict EU funding deadlines and coordinate with medical equipment deliveries.
tenders.what_they_want: Hospital construction work including building expansion (superstructure of Urology department, relocation and expansion of Clinical Oncology department), installation readiness for specialized medical equipment including surgical columns, washers, and ultrasound devices. Work to be performed on an active hospital facility with shared communication routes and critical installations.
tenders.eligibility_requirements: Bidders must submit upon request: a list of completed construction works (as per point 6.1.2.4.1 of procurement documents and Annex 5), and a list of personnel (as per point 6.1.2.4.2 and Annex 6). For joint ventures, the list must include only construction works in which the bidder directly participated.

tenders.english_summary: Jan Yperman Hospital in Belgium is procuring 20 new mobile motorized operating tables for their operating theater. The contract includes purchase, delivery, installation, commissioning, maintenance, and necessary training, with all accessories required to be interchangeable across all tables.
tenders.what_they_want: 20 mobile motorized operating tables with interchangeable accessories; all tables must support minimum 30° Trendelenburg position, with at least 5 tables capable of minimum 45° Trendelenburg position; delivery, installation, commissioning, maintenance contract, training, and option to purchase additional replacement accessories during product lifetime included.
tenders.eligibility_requirements: Single supplier required who can provide all 20 mobile motorized operating tables with the specified requirements.

tenders.english_summary: Jan Yperman Hospital in Belgium is procuring 20 mobile motorized operating tables for their operating theater, including delivery, installation, commissioning, maintenance, and training. All accessories must be interchangeable across all tables, with specific Trendelenburg positioning requirements (at least 30° for all tables, and at least 45° for minimum 5 tables).
tenders.what_they_want: 20 mobile motorized operating tables with interchangeable accessories. Minimum 30° Trendelenburg capability for all tables; at least 5 tables must have minimum 45° Trendelenburg capability. Includes delivery, installation, commissioning, maintenance contract, training, and option to purchase additional replacement accessories during lifespan.
tenders.eligibility_requirements: Single bidder must be able to supply all 20 mobile motorized operating tables with compatible accessories across the entire range.

tenders.original_title: Sweden – Dental and subspecialty instruments and devices
tenders.english_summary: Region Gotland (Sweden) is conducting a market consultation prior to procurement of dental treatment units and X-ray equipment for dental care. They are seeking contact with suppliers to gather information about the market and receive supplier input on dental equipment including treatment chairs, X-ray equipment, sensors, and instrument cleaning systems.
tenders.what_they_want: Dental treatment units (dental unitar), patient treatment chairs (behandlingsstolar), X-ray equipment for dental clinics (röntgenutrustning), intraoral digital sensors (intraorala digitala sensorer), instrument cleaning systems (instrumentrengöringssystem), and service/maintenance of own or other suppliers' equipment.
tenders.eligibility_requirements: Suppliers that market one or more solutions within the specified dental equipment categories are welcome to register. No specific certifications, experience levels, or company size requirements mentioned.

tenders.english_summary: This tender is for a spinal cord stimulation system to stabilize the lumbar spine through electrical stimulation of the lower back muscles. The system includes implantable electrodes, a pulse generator to be fitted into the pelvic bone, and external programming equipment, along with intraoperative support and patient training.
tenders.what_they_want: Spinal cord stimulator system consisting of: implantable electrodes for lower back muscle stimulation, pulse generator/stimulator for pelvic bone implantation (left or right side), external programming device for adjustment, patient-oriented handheld control device for self-management during therapy.
tenders.eligibility_requirements: Bidders must provide certificates and evidence regarding the proposed procedure, proof of material compatibility for electrodes and stimulator, and MRI compatibility certification. Must demonstrate postoperative support concept and provide intraoperative accompaniment for initial programming and patient training.

tenders.original_title: Germany – Medical equipments, pharmaceuticals and personal care products
tenders.english_summary: This is a market survey for the procurement of a robotic-assisted surgical system to support hip and knee endoprosthesis implantation at a German hospital. The buyer is exploring market availability, pricing, delivery times, and technical alternatives for robotic systems compatible with their currently used implant series.
tenders.what_they_want: Robotic-assisted surgical system for hip and knee endoprosthesis procedures, compatible with specific implant series including EXETER V40, MAKO/MCK FEMORAL, MAKO/MCK TIBIAL BASEPLATE, MAKO TIBIAL ONLAY INSERT, TRIATHLON CR FEM, TRIATHLON PS FEM, TRIATHLON P/A CR, TRIATHLON PRIM, TRIATHLON CR X3, TRITANIUM BPLATE, TRIATHLON ASYMMETRIC X3, TRIATHLON PATELLA, MODULAR DUAL MOBILITY, DELTA V40 CERAMIC, TRIDENTII TRITANIUM SOLID, TRIDENTII TRITANIUM CLUSTER, TRIDENT 0, and RESTORATION ADM 4. System must support three applications (hip, knee, and patella procedures), include CT-based pre-operative planning with product specialist support, and include delivery, installation, acceptance, operational handover, and maintenance services.
tenders.eligibility_requirements: System must be approved for use in Germany and compatible with specified implant series. Suppliers unable to meet mandatory criteria may propose equivalent alternatives/solutions with supporting documentation. Note: switching implant series is not considered an acceptable alternative solution.

tenders.original_title: Estonia – Operating theatre devices and instruments
tenders.english_summary: This is a tender for the procurement of high-speed surgical drills and ENT shavers used in ENT (ear, nose, and throat) surgery and neurosurgery by North Estonia Regional Hospital Foundation.
tenders.what_they_want: High-speed drills for neurosurgery (neurokirurgia kiirpuurid) and ENT shavers for ENT surgery applications
tenders.eligibility_requirements: NOT FOUND (requirements referenced in procurement base documents which are not included in this notice)

tenders.buyer_name: УНИВЕРСИТЕТСКА МНОГОПРОФИЛНА БОЛНИЦА ЗА АКТИВНО ЛЕЧЕНИЕ "АЛЕКСАНДРОВСКА" ЕАД
tenders.english_summary: This is a tender for the supply of 4 Gallium-68 (Ga-68) generators over a 24-month period for a university hospital in Bulgaria. The procurement includes two types of generators compatible with specific synthesis modules, along with sterile HCl solution vials for elution, with delivery required within 70 calendar days.
tenders.what_they_want: 4 Gallium-68 generators total: 1 unit of Type 1 Ge-68/Ga-68 generator compatible with ITM IQS-TS synthesis module (Germany) with 50mCi/1850 MBq activity including transport, installation and replacement of connecting lines; 250 vials of sterile 0.05M HCl solution (4ml vials) compatible with ITM Ge-68/Ga-68 for single-use GMP elution; 3 units of Type 2 Ga-68 generators meeting cGMP standards with ≥50 mCi activity, ≤5ml elution volume, ≤0.1M HCl molarity, ≤175 EU/ml endotoxins, minimum 250 elutions or 10 months shelf life, supplied with sufficient HCl for 250 elutions.
tenders.eligibility_requirements: Bidder must be authorized by the manufacturer or their authorized representative to sell the medical devices in Bulgaria. Must provide catalogs, brochures, information sheets or equivalent with Bulgarian translation showing detailed product information, specifications, and manufacturing characteristics proving quality and compliance with technical specifications.

tenders.original_title: Estonia – Operating theatre devices and instruments
tenders.english_summary: This is a procurement for a robotic surgery system for the North Estonia Regional Hospital. The system must be universal and suitable for use in general surgery, urology, gynecology, thoracic surgery, and head and neck surgery, and includes an operating table, instruments, and training.
tenders.what_they_want: Robotic surgery system (universal/multi-specialty), operating table, surgical instruments, and training. System must be compatible with general surgery, urology, gynecology, thoracic surgery, and head and neck surgery.
tenders.eligibility_requirements: Exclusion grounds and qualification conditions are specified in the procurement's base documents (not provided in this notice excerpt).

tenders.english_summary: This is a tender for nutritional therapy preparations, feeding devices and accessories for home-based patient nutrition issued by North Estonia Regional Hospital. The procurement covers various enteral and oral nutritional preparations for different medical conditions (diabetes, epilepsy, dialysis, etc.), feeding equipment including gastrostomy extensions, protein and fiber supplements, and thickening agents for patients with swallowing disorders.
tenders.what_they_want: Nutritional therapy preparations and feeding equipment including: skin-level gastrostomy button extensions; complete enteral nutrition preparations (energy-rich with fiber, high-energy with fluid restriction, vitamin/mineral enriched, vegan-suitable, for diabetes/hyperglycemia, high-protein, for digestive/absorption disorders); oral nutrition preparations (energy and protein-rich without/with fiber, with EPA+DHA for perioperative use, ketogenic modular for epilepsy, savory flavored, reduced mineral for dialysis patients); preparations enriched with branched-chain amino acids for liver disease/celiac patients; protein powder; fiber powder; preparations with increased zinc content; powdered food and drink thickeners for dysphagia patients.
tenders.eligibility_requirements: Exclusion grounds and qualification conditions are referenced to be found in the procurement's basic documents (not specified in this excerpt).

tenders.original_title: Poland – Disposable non-chemical medical consumables and haematological consumables
tenders.buyer_name: Wojewódzki Szpital Specjalistyczny im. Stefana Kardynała Wyszyńskiego Samodzielny Publiczny Zakład Opieki Zdrowotnej
tenders.english_summary: This is a tender for the supply of disposable non-chemical medical consumables and haematological consumables to a specialist hospital in Poland. The procurement includes patient washing gloves and hair washing caps, disposable resuscitators for adults/children/infants, ureteral splinting sets, and urological catheters, probes, baskets and ureteral pushers.
tenders.what_they_want: (1) Patient washing gloves and hair washing caps (2 product positions); (2) Disposable resuscitators for adults, children and infants (3 product positions); (3) Ureteral splinting sets (7 product positions); (4) Catheters, probes, baskets, and ureteral pushers (12 product positions). No specific brands or model numbers mentioned.
tenders.eligibility_requirements: Products must be approved for trade and use in Poland according to applicable legal regulations. All medical devices must have CE marking and documentation confirming appropriate conformity assessment procedures according to the Medical Devices Act of April 7, 2022. Bidders must submit product documentation (product cards, catalogs, instructions, information leaflets) issued by manufacturer or authorized representative.

tenders.buyer_name: Ortopedyczno – Rehabilitacyjny Szpital Kliniczny im. Wiktora Degi Uniwersytetu Medycznego im. Karola Marcinkowskiego w Poznaniu
tenders.english_summary: This tender is for the supply of one operating room integration system for the Orthopedic and Rehabilitation Clinical Hospital in Poznań, Poland. The procurement is part of a larger investment project for the expansion and adaptation of hospital buildings, which is being executed by general contractor WARBUD S.A.
tenders.what_they_want: One (1) operating room integration system (system integracji sal operacyjnych). Specific technical parameters and detailed requirements are referenced in an attachment to the procurement documentation.
tenders.eligibility_requirements: Bidders must be willing to cooperate and collaborate with the general contractor WARBUD S.A. (contract number DT-SREM/31/2022 dated June 15, 2023) for execution of this scope of work. No other specific eligibility requirements mentioned in this excerpt.

tenders.english_summary: The North Savo Wellbeing Area's University Hospital of Kuopio endoscopy unit is procuring capsule endoscopy equipment for small intestine examination, including capsule cameras, necessary device usage rights, device-specific supplies, accessories and software for the contract period. Approximately 180 examinations are performed annually. Trial use of compliant devices will be conducted after tender submission.
tenders.what_they_want: Capsule endoscopy equipment (capsule cameras) for small intestine examination, associated device-specific supplies, accessories, software, and usage rights for the equipment during the contract period. Equipment must undergo trial use consisting of 5 capsule endoscopy examinations within 2 months of tender submission.
tenders.evaluation_criteria: Total points consist of price (40 points) and quality (60 points). Trial use will be conducted on all equipment meeting minimum requirements, with each device performing 5 capsule endoscopy examinations.

tenders.english_summary: The Faculty Hospital in Motol, Czech Republic, is procuring a new steam sterilizer (autoclave) for the Institute of Medical Microbiology. The contract includes delivery, installation, commissioning, staff training, and warranty/post-warranty service of the equipment.
tenders.what_they_want: One new, unused steam sterilizer (autoclave) with all accessories, complete installation and commissioning, functionality verification and testing, staff training/instruction for healthcare personnel, and warranty plus post-warranty service.
tenders.eligibility_requirements: Service personnel must be authorized according to §41 and §44-46 of Act No. 375/2022 Coll. on Medical Devices. Service technicians must hold manufacturer certification for training. Equipment must meet technical requirements specified in Annex 1 of the purchase contract.

tenders.english_summary: The tender is for the supply and installation of a steam sterilizer (autoclave) for the Institute of Medical Microbiology at the 2nd Faculty of Medicine and Motol University Hospital in the Czech Republic. The scope includes delivery, installation, commissioning, staff training, and warranty/post-warranty service.
tenders.what_they_want: One steam sterilizer (autoclave) for medical use, must be new and unused, delivered with all accessories and components, no additional purchases required. Includes installation, commissioning with functionality verification and all prescribed tests, staff training/instruction, warranty and post-warranty service.
tenders.eligibility_requirements: Service personnel must be authorized according to Section 41 of Act No. 375/2022 Coll. on Medical Devices. Service technicians must hold manufacturer certification for training according to Sections 44-46 of Act No. 375/2022 Coll. on Medical Devices and In Vitro Diagnostic Medical Devices.

tenders.original_title: Finland – Medical equipments, pharmaceuticals and personal care products
tenders.english_summary: This tender is for the procurement of various types of biopsy needles and mammography marking devices for the Northern Ostrobothnia Wellbeing Services County in Finland. The procurement is divided into three subsections covering fine and thick biopsy needles, bone marrow biopsy needles, and mammography marking products.
tenders.what_they_want: Subsection 1: Fine biopsy needles, automatic thick biopsy needles, urological automatic thick biopsy needles, fullcore automatic thick biopsy needles, semi-automatic thick biopsy needles, programmable semi-automatic and automatic thick biopsy needles, thick biopsy needles for handles, coaxial biopsy needles. Subsection 2: Bone marrow biopsy needles with T-handle (for specimen and aspiration), adjustable bone marrow aspiration needles, coaxial bone biopsy needles, bone biopsy needle sets, sclerotic bone biopsy needle sets. Subsection 3: Mammography skin marking devices, mammography marking wires, ductography needles, mammography clips for tomography/stereo/contrast mammography, mammography clips for ultrasound guidance, mammography clips for magnetic guidance.
tenders.evaluation_criteria: Selection based primarily on price, with quality considered as mandatory requirements. For each product category, 2-3 products will be selected in priority order based on price. The first-ranked product will be ordered primarily, with medical justification required for ordering other ranked products.

tenders.english_summary: Region Dalarna is procuring a framework agreement for communication aids including accessories, spare parts and services. The procurement covers various types of communication devices ranging from simple speech buttons to advanced eye-controlled touchscreen devices, voice amplifiers, and software for creating visual support materials.
tenders.what_they_want: Communication aids divided into 7 categories: A - Speech devices with one or more buttons and recorded speech, B - Speech devices with physical keyboard and synthetic speech, C - Speech devices with touchscreen, D - Advanced speech devices with touchscreen, E - Advanced speech devices with touchscreen and eye control, F - Voice amplifiers, G - Software/service for producing visual support materials for printing. Also includes accessories, spare parts, documentation, and training for handling and technical use.
tenders.evaluation_criteria: Suppliers must meet qualification requirements and mandatory requirements within each category. The region intends to award contracts to all suppliers that fulfill these requirements within each respective category. Each category is evaluated and awarded separately.

tenders.buyer_name: Fakultná nemocnica s poliklinikou F. D. Roosevelta Banská Bystrica
tenders.english_summary: The tender is for a 4K/ICG laparoscopic system including related services for the 2nd Surgical Clinic of the F. D. Roosevelt University Hospital in Banská Bystrica, Slovakia. The equipment must be new, unused, and meet minimum technical-medical and functional parameters specified by the contracting authority.
tenders.what_they_want: 4K/ICG laparoscopic system (coelioscopy devices) that is new, unused, not refurbished, approved for import and sale in Slovakia/EU, compliant with international standards and STN norms, with valid ŠUKL code. Services include delivery, installation, functional testing, documentation handover, staff training, and full authorized service support for minimum 24 months including preventive inspections.
tenders.eligibility_requirements: Bidders must provide equipment approved for import and sale in Slovakia or the European Union, complying with valid international standards, STN standards, and generally binding legal regulations. Equipment must have an assigned valid ŠUKL code. Equivalent products are allowed if they meet the required utility, operational, and functional characteristics, with burden of proof on the bidder.

tenders.buyer_name: The Common Services Agency (more commonly known as NHS National Services Scotland) (NSS)
tenders.english_summary: NHS National Services Scotland is procuring a framework agreement for various types of central venous catheters and related accessories. The tender covers 18 lots including coated and non-coated CVCs, paediatric catheters, PICC lines, arterial lines, dialysis catheters, implantable ports, stabilisation devices, and associated accessories.
tenders.what_they_want: Coated Central Venous Catheters (CVC), Non-Coated Central Venous Catheters, Paediatric Central Venous Catheters, Midline Catheters, Skin Tunnelling Catheters, PICC Lines (Antimicrobial), PICC Lines (Non-Coated), Seldinger arterial lines, Non-Seldinger Arterial Cannulas, IV Flush Saline Pre-filled Syringes, Stabilisation Devices, Dialysis Central Venous Catheters, Implantable Ports, Central Venous Catheter Insertion Packs, and related accessories and innovation items.
tenders.evaluation_criteria: Lots 1-14 are scored lots; Lot 15 (Accessories) and Lot 16 (Innovation) are unscored lots with suppliers automatically awarded if successful in scored lots 1-14; Lot 17 (Implantable Ports) and Lot 18 (CVC Insertion Packs) are unscored lots requiring suppliers to meet mandatory requirements and tender against any scored lot. Specific weighting criteria not mentioned.

tenders.original_title: Finland – Miscellaneous medical devices and products
tenders.english_summary: Lapin hyvinvointialue (Lapland Wellbeing Services County) is establishing a Dynamic Purchasing System (DPS) for the procurement of various respiratory devices and their accessories. The devices will be used in emergency departments, intensive care units, surgical and anesthesia units, with an estimated total value of up to 2,000,000 euros over the period 2026-2036.
tenders.what_they_want: Respiratory devices and accessories including: respirators, ventilators, breathing machines, and associated supplies. Procurement must include related services such as information systems, scheduled maintenance, and support services to ensure proper operation and availability of the devices.
tenders.eligibility_requirements: Candidates must meet the suitability requirements stated in the ESPD form and other conditions specified in the participation request. All candidates meeting the suitability requirements will be admitted to the Dynamic Purchasing System.

tenders.original_title: Iceland – Imaging equipment for medical, dental and veterinary use
tenders.english_summary: The New Landspitali (NLSH) project organization in Iceland is seeking information from qualified suppliers for stationary interventional imaging systems. The systems are needed for three clinical applications: cardiac catheterization labs (including electrophysiology), interventional radiology (vascular and neurological interventions), and interventional endoscopy.
tenders.what_they_want: Stationary interventional imaging systems for: (1) Cardiac cath lab including electrophysiology applications, (2) Interventional radiology for vascular and neurological interventions, (3) Interventional endoscopy
tenders.eligibility_requirements: Qualified suppliers (specific qualification criteria not detailed in the notice)

tenders.english_summary: This is a market survey (pre-procurement phase) for surgical chairs specifically for the Eye Department at Helse Stavanger HF hospital in Norway. The contracting authority is gathering market information, price indications, and supplier input before launching formal tender 2025/44068.
tenders.what_they_want: Surgical chairs (operating chairs) for the Eye Department. No specific models or brands mentioned.
tenders.evaluation_criteria: NOT FOUND (this is a market survey, not the formal tender evaluation stage)

tenders.original_title: Germany – Recording systems and exploration devices
tenders.english_summary: This is a market consultation (pre-procurement) notice by Universitätsklinikum Aachen (Aachen University Hospital) for recording systems and exploration devices. The purpose is to assess market interest and feasibility before launching a formal procurement procedure, with interested parties invited to submit structured feedback and proposals by January 19, 2025.
tenders.what_they_want: Recording systems and exploration devices (specific models, brands, and detailed technical specifications not mentioned in this preliminary market consultation notice).
tenders.evaluation_criteria: NOT FOUND (this is a pre-procurement market consultation phase; evaluation criteria will be determined for the subsequent formal tender procedure).

tenders.english_summary: This tender is for the supply of modular (standardized) office, kitchen, and medical furniture, including delivery, handling, assembly, cleaning, and disposal of packaging materials. In exceptional cases, custom-made (atypical) furniture may be required according to specific buyer requirements.
tenders.what_they_want: Modular (standardized) office furniture, kitchen furniture, and medical furniture, including delivery to destination, handling, assembly, cleaning services, and packaging material disposal. Custom-made (atypical) furniture may be requested in exceptional cases.

tenders.original_title: Czechia – Disposable non-chemical medical consumables and haematological consumables
tenders.buyer_name: Ústav hematologie a krevní transfuze Praha
tenders.english_summary: This tender is for the supply of disposable non-chemical medical consumables and haematological consumables for the Institute of Haematology and Blood Transfusion in Prague. It includes universal medical consumables (gloves, syringes, needles, surgical sets, incontinence aids, etc.) and technology-bound consumables (special sets, connectors, tubes, bags, filtration units) compatible with the buyer's existing medical equipment.
tenders.what_they_want: Universal medical consumables including disposable items (shoe covers, caps, surgical gowns, surgical sets and drapes, pads, razors, gloves, suture materials, tubes, sets, bags, masks, non-woven textile materials, filters, instruments, syringes, needles), incontinence aids; Technology-bound medical consumables including special sets, connectors, tubes, bags, attachments, filtration units that are compatible with the buyer's existing medical equipment.

tenders.english_summary: Klinikverbund Allgäu gGmbH is procuring diagnostic imaging equipment for a new construction project at the Mindelheim location. The procurement includes an MRI scanner, cardiac catheterization system, CT scanner, and X-ray system, including delivery, installation, and commissioning.
tenders.what_they_want: One 1.5 Tesla helium-lean magnetic resonance tomography scanner (MRI) including RF cabin; one cardiac catheterization system for treatment of percutaneous standard procedures and structural heart diseases; one computed tomography scanner suitable for cardiac diagnostics (minimum 64 physical detector rows); one ceiling-mounted Bucky X-ray system with ceiling-guided radiator.

tenders.english_summary: This is a multi-lot tender by the General Hospital of Serres, Greece, for the procurement of various medical equipment across 18 sub-projects. The equipment includes diagnostic imaging devices, dialysis machines, surgical equipment, and intensive care units.
tenders.what_they_want: Sub-project 1: CT Scanner (Axial Tomograph); Sub-project 2: Digital X-ray system; Sub-project 3: Spectrometry Analyzer; Sub-project 4: Hemodialysis Machines (11 units); Sub-project 5: Dialysis Chairs with scales (18 units); Sub-project 6: Ultrasound system for Radiology; Sub-project 7: Cardiac Ultrasound system; Sub-project 8: Electroencephalograph (EEG) for Neurology; Sub-project 9: Transcranial Doppler Ultrasound; Sub-project 10: Refraction Unit for Ophthalmology; Sub-project 11: Sterile Tube Welder; Sub-project 12: Slide Staining Device; Sub-project 13: Portable C-ARM Fluoroscopy system; Sub-project 14: Surgical Instrument Washers (3 units); Sub-project 15: Laparoscopic Tower; Sub-project 16: Physiology Monitoring System; Sub-project 17: Coronary Care Unit Beds (7 units); Sub-project 18: Anesthesia Machines (2 units)

tenders.buyer_name: AZIENDA OSPEDALIERA UNIVERSITARIA POLICLINICO "P. GIACCONE" APPALTI E FORNITURE/AREA PROVVEDITORATO - PALERMO
tenders.english_summary: This is a tender for sterilization equipment and related consumables for a university hospital in Palermo, Italy. The procurement includes 3 sterilizers and 2 instrument washers along with dedicated consumable materials.
tenders.what_they_want: 3 sterilizers (Sterilizzatrici), 2 instrument washers (lavaferri), and dedicated consumable materials for these devices.

tenders.original_title: Poland – Disposable non-chemical medical consumables and haematological consumables
tenders.english_summary: This tender is for successive deliveries of disposable medical equipment and small medical equipment for a pediatric hospital in Bielsko-Biała, Poland. The detailed list of required medical consumables and equipment is specified in Annex 2 of the procurement documentation.
tenders.what_they_want: Disposable medical equipment and small medical equipment (specific items listed in Annex 2 of the tender documentation - not provided in this notice)

tenders.original_title: Poland – Disposable non-chemical medical consumables and haematological consumables
tenders.english_summary: This is a tender for successive deliveries of disposable gloves and personal protective equipment for a pediatric hospital in Bielsko-Biała, Poland. The detailed specifications are provided in Annex 2 of the procurement documents.
tenders.what_they_want: Disposable gloves (single-use) and personal protective equipment (PPE) for successive/ongoing deliveries.

tenders.original_title: Poland – Disposable non-chemical medical consumables and haematological consumables
tenders.english_summary: This tender is for successive deliveries of disposable medical equipment and small medical equipment to a pediatric hospital in Bielsko-Biała, Poland. The detailed scope of procurement and list of assortment items are specified in Annex 2 to the procurement specification document.
tenders.what_they_want: Disposable medical equipment and small medical equipment (specific items listed in Annex 2 of procurement specification). No specific model numbers or brands mentioned in the notice.

tenders.english_summary: Region Västerbotten in Sweden needs to replace a SPECT/CT camera at the Nuclear Medicine department at Norrland University Hospital in Umeå. The system must be capable of producing both planar images and SPECT/CT, equipped with collimators for low, medium, and high energy photon measurements, with CT producing full diagnostic quality images.
tenders.what_they_want: SPECT/CT camera system capable of producing planar images and SPECT/CT imaging, equipped with collimators for measuring low-energy, medium-energy, and high-energy photons, with CT component capable of producing full diagnostic quality images for use in cardiac, kidney, adrenal, skeletal, thyroid, parathyroid, lymphatic system examinations, rare tumor investigations, and dosimetry.

tenders.buyer_name: 4. Wojskowy Szpital Kliniczny z Polikliniką Samodzielny Publiczny Zakład Opieki Zdrowotnej we Wrocławiu
tenders.english_summary: This is a procurement for the delivery of angiography devices along with room adaptation as part of Poland's National Recovery and Resilience Plan. The project involves replacement of angiographs in hybrid operating rooms (Cardiosurgery, Hemodynamics Lab, Electrophysiology Lab) and purchase of a new angiograph for a Hemodynamics Lab, including associated construction and adaptation works.
tenders.what_they_want: Angiography devices (X-ray apparatus, angiography equipment, digital angiography devices) for multiple locations: hybrid operating room in Cardiosurgery Department, Hemodynamics Laboratory (replacement and new purchase), and Electrophysiology Laboratory. Associated services include architectural design, construction supervision, engineering services, construction works (electrical, plumbing, insulation, finishing, flooring, painting), furniture, laboratory equipment, and medical gases.

tenders.english_summary: KB Dubrava hospital in Croatia is tendering for medical consumables for neurological diagnostic procedures including invasive monitoring, EMG, EEG, TMS examinations, and polysomnography. The procurement covers various items such as electrodes, caps, gels, pastes, detergents, non-invasive ventilation materials, and equipment compatible with their existing Dantec Clavis device.

tenders.original_title: NHSDG Estates & Property ICES LOLER Inspection

tenders.what_they_want: LOLER inspection services for lifting equipment located in approximately 300 individual households as part of the Integrated Community Equipment Service.

tenders.original_title: NP16726 Multi Modality Imaging Equipment and Maintenance Framework
tenders.buyer_name: The Common Services Agency (more commonly known as Public Services Delivery Scotland) (PSD Scotland)
tenders.english_summary: This is a framework agreement for the supply, installation, maintenance, servicing and repair of a comprehensive range of diagnostic imaging and therapy equipment across NHS Scotland facilities. The procurement covers both new equipment purchase and ongoing maintenance services from OEM and third-party providers, including associated consumables and turnkey installation projects.
tenders.what_they_want: Bladder scanners; contrast and radiopharmaceutical injectors with syringes and consumables; diagnostic imaging equipment including X-Ray, Computed Radiography, CT, MR, PET/CT, Mammography, Fluoroscopy, Lithotripter, Interventional, Dental, Bone Densitometry, Image Intensifier, Nuclear Imaging, Ultrasound, Linear Accelerators; mammography vacuum devices; mammography non-wire lesion localisation detectors and devices; sentinel lymph node location detectors and non-radioactive tracer fluids; specimen cabinets; digital systems for scoliosis; Angiography equipment; mobile units or modular builds. Services required include supply, installation, pre-installation works, maintenance, servicing, and repair (both OEM and third-party/multi-vendor maintenance).

tenders.english_summary: NHS Greater Glasgow and Clyde is procuring one Linear Accelerator (Linac) to replace aging radiotherapy equipment that has reached end of life at the Beatson Satellite facility at University Hospital Monklands in Airdrie, Lanarkshire.

tenders.english_summary: This is a procurement for various types of public transport vehicles by LIMOGES METROPOLE in France. The tender covers four categories: urban buses (minibus, midibus, standard, and articulated), trolleybuses, electric urban shuttles, and vehicles for persons with reduced mobility, all new or used, with diesel, HVO, or electric propulsion.
tenders.what_they_want: Category 1: Urban buses - minibus (<10m), midibus (10m), standard (12m), or articulated (18m) with diesel, HVO, or electric propulsion, 1-4 doors, new or used. Category 2: Trolleybuses - standard (12m) or articulated (18m), electric propulsion, 3-4 doors, new or used. Category 3: Electric urban shuttle vehicles, thermal or electric, accessible for persons with reduced mobility (PMR) and wheelchair users (UFR), new or used. Category 4: Vehicles for transport of persons with reduced mobility, thermal or electric, specialized for PMR and wheelchair users (UFR), new or used.
